Have a look on some of our batters at Mr Andy’s Cup @ Slow Pitch Carnival 2023

A Baseball5 Introduction Clinic and Training will be conducted in MMU Cyberjaya campus. Baseball5 is an urban version of the classic games of baseball and softball. It is a fast, young, and dynamic discipline that follows the same founding principles of its parent disciplines. Baseball5 can be played everywhere and requires only a rubber ball. Event is open to ALL, not only MMU Students!!!🥳

Event Details: 
Date: 12th November 2022 
Time: 9am – 4pm
Venue: MMU Cyberjaya Indoor Sports Complex

Transportation will be provided for MMU Melaka campus students who are interested in this event. Transportation seats are limited, Hurry up!!! 🔥🔥

Feel free to register via the link below.

Event Registration form: 
https://forms.gle/KcnvkF83KVbkm3bj7

For enquiries, please contact:

016-959 5204 Teo Jin Ji
016-555 1383 Chang Yu Fong
